branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Causal-wave landing / projector / carrier diagnostic; running-envelope context

description: External benchmark target values for particle-physics observables used in causal-wave landings. Sources are the Particle Data Group (PDG 2024) and standard textbooks where indicated.

alpha_dn_yukawa_exponent.role: down-sector Yukawa scaling exponent (compact reduction of the SM down-quark Yukawa hierarchy)
alpha_dn_yukawa_exponent.source: structural target derived from SM hierarchy fits

w_DE.role: Dark energy equation of state (cosmological-constant limit)

alpha_cl_lepton_yukawa.source: structural target derived from SM hierarchy fits

sin2_theta_W.role: Weinberg mixing angle (on-shell scheme value at M_Z)

Einstein_gap_two_thirds.role: Asymptotic exponent of the Einstein-identity gap on finite correlation lattices
